name: TrailPaint Agent Skills
description: Discovery index for TrailPaint's agent-callable capabilities. Mirrors /.well-known/agent-card.json (A2A Protocol) in the Agent Skills Discovery shape (Cloudflare RFC v0.2.0).

skills.name: trail-map-editor
skills.description: Interactive web editor for hand-drawn style trail maps. Add spots with 31 icons, draw routes with 5 colors and hand-drawn dashed lines, attach photos, adjust elevation profiles.

skills.name: import-from-photos
skills.description: Upload up to 20 photos; TrailPaint extracts EXIF GPS coordinates to auto-create spots. Supports iPhone HEIC and Android JPEG. Photos without GPS are grouped for manual placement. Auto reverse-geocodes place names via Photon/Nominatim.

skills.name: import-geographic-formats
skills.description: Import routes and waypoints from KML (Google My Maps), GeoJSON (geojson.io, Google Takeout), GPX (hiking apps, Garmin), or native .trailpaint project files.

skills.name: export-png-illustration
skills.description: Export the trail map as a high-resolution PNG illustration. Multiple aspect ratios (1:1 IG, 9:16 Story, 4:3, original), 3 border styles, 2 style filters, optional stats overlay.

skills.name: share-link-backend
skills.description: Create a short share URL that round-trips a full TrailPaint project (with photos) via Cloudflare Workers + KV. POST /api/s with { hash, name?, cover? } returns { url, id, expiresAt }. TTL 90 days. See /.well-known/api-catalog.
